## Why these work
- Look premium (materials/finish) but stay budget.

## How to choose fast
1. Set a ceiling of ₹1,499 in filters.
2. Sort by Featured, then filter ≥4.3★ and ≥500 reviews.
3. Prefer metals/wood/leather over cheap plastics for “premium” feel.
